Okay, this is very, like, this is all text, so no images here.
Okay.
Cool.
One thing I also wanted to clarify is, are you using an internal content calendar?
And if yes, could we get access to it?
Since we're going to be starting keyword research for you this week, and we just want to make sure that we're not suggesting anything that you're already planning to publish.
I wish we could say yes.

Elaine has tried to start getting something going for a blog, but we typically have played more of a supporting role where content is provided to us that we then help to, or Elaine now mostly, helps to review and optimize for search.
So, if we could get...
Choose something that had, like, the next few months planned?
Would that be, like, is anything helpful, or would we need to look more long-term to, for it to be valuable?
No, I mean, you know, the next couple of months would be, actually, be perfect.
So that's, that's enough, because we also provide, like, the first batch of ideas that we provide, we usually send, send around 40 or 50 blog ideas at a time.
So that, that would be good.
Okay.
Elaine, you know, correct me if I'm wrong, but I think we can feel comfortable sending over what you had provided in terms of recent topic research.
Just know, for the GrowthX team, that this won't encompass everything in the pipeline for blog, unless we can get that from the specific blog manager.
Like, this is really areas of focus.
I'm rambling.
Basically, we helped to provide topics that, you know, we think could supplement the existing blog content.
Content.
That being said, it's not everything that they're planning on doing.
So we can at least send that in the short term.
Okay.
Yeah, that works too.
Yeah, I we can provide the tracker that we sent to Pete.
And then I can also give you the list of topics lined up for Cyber Encyclopedia.
But also just to clarify, we're moving away from doing Cyber Encyclopedia articles, right?
That's still, okay.
All right.
Yeah, I mean, the Cyber Encyclopedia, from what I'm seeing right now, it's all like what is content, which we will not be.
Outside of like maybe cyber resilience, which you would have to have like a definitional blog post, but everything else is going to be like more, this is very like general.
All right.
Exactly.
And that's perfectly fine.
And I think that having cyber resilience...
It's outside of the encyclopedia, especially as this is a new, a very new niche, like you were saying, compared, you know, with the search volume numbers there.
I think having like a foundational blog post to speak to a newer topic is a better place for that.
Okay, cool.
So, yeah, just to reiterate, so our next steps are going to be, so feel free to leave any feedback on the strategy, like the content focus areas.
We're going to start doing keyword research towards the end of this week.
And then next week, we're going to come back to you with a content calendar with some blog ideas for you to review and kind of tell us if we're headed in the right direction, provide feedback there.
We're also going to look into doing additional non-blog ideas, like you suggested.
So we're going to, Erik and I are going to discuss this internally to see what kind of pipelines we can set up for you.
And I'm also going to brainstorm some assets that we could create for you.
They're not traditional blog posts, but are still valuable enough for someone to download because we do want to provide like something like super unique so that people want to download it.
So that's going to be on my to-do list.
We have set up Scrunch.
I think I can show that to you next week just to monitor your AI visibility.
We're also going to be setting up your Looker dashboard for performance monitoring.
And yeah, so those are, that's our to-do list for the next couple of days.
And Nick, I don't know if you got that email I sent over yesterday for the access to like Google Analytics Search Console and CMS.
I don't know if I did, to be honest with you.
Okay.
Yep.
So those are, we just need access to the, at least Google Search Console and Google Analytics to set up the Looker dashboard and then CMS prior to us being able to publish.
I see it here.
Cool.
Was you guys getting CMS access part of the original contract?
Like, was that language in the contract?
I would have to check on that.
Okay.
Because I was not aware of that.
And I would have a really hard time believing that our security and legal team signed off on that.
I would imagine my understanding was that it was going to go from you all to us where we would publish.
Okay.
Yeah, we'll double check.
We'll double check.
But I think either way, we have other clients that do the same.
So whatever is most comfortable for your kind of your security team is what we can work with.
Okay.
Yeah, sounds good.
Wonderful.
Okay.
Cool.
Well, thank you very much for your time.
I'll be on the lookout for your comments.
And, yeah, I'll see you next week.
Cool.
Thanks, Thanks, all.
Bye.
See ya.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between N-Able and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and AI-powered content generation process.](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented their AI-powered content generation pipeline, including company context artifacts, audience personas, and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on 5 topic clusters aligned with N-Able's products and positioning as a cyber resilience platform](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [N-Able team open to exploring non-blog content types (e.g. long-form resources, benchmarks) in addition to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Next steps include keyword research, content calendar creation, and setting up performance monitoring tools](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2540.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Introduction

  - [Aida introduced as editorial account strategist, responsible for content strategy and primary point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Erik handles overall account management and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

### Content Generation Process Overview

  - [Uses in-house Atlas platform with multiple AI models (Claude for writing)](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Pipeline: Input \> Brief \> Research \> Outline \> Draft \> Fact Check \> Human Review](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Incorporates SEMrush data for keyword/competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Can be customized based on client needs (e.g. adding expert review step)](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Strategy Presentation

  - [5 topic clusters aligned with N-Able products:](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
    1.  N-Central Remote Monitoring
    2.  MDR
    3.  Data Backup/Compliance
    4.  MSP Scaling
    5.  Cyber Resilience Culture
  - [Mix of high/low volume keywords, focus on LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Open to feedback on clusters and content focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)

### Content Types and Distribution

  - [Primary focus on blog posts, but open to exploring other formats (e.g. long-form resources, benchmarks)](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [N-Able team to clarify preferred content distribution (blog vs. resources vs. cyber encyclopedia)](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Discussion on potentially refreshing/pruning existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)

### Image Assets for Content

  - [N-Able uses mix of custom graphics and stock photos for blog headers](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [GrowthX can provide placeholder images if needed](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [N-Able team to confirm internal process for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)

### Access and Workflow

  - [GrowthX requesting access to Google Analytics, Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2614.0)
  - [CMS access to be clarified - N-Able prefers to handle publishing internally](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2614.0)

## Next Steps

  - [N-Able team to provide feedback on content strategy document](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2540.0)
  - [N-Able to share upcoming content plans to avoid duplication](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2355.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin keyword research and create content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2540.0)
  - [Explore non-blog content ideas (e.g. long-form resources)](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
  - [Set up Scrunch for AI visibility monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)
  - [Configure Looker dashboard for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)
  - [Clarify CMS access/publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Xrp5FaixVRtB5wCL4UnNhfqz-wz4ejeG?tab=summary&timestamp=2614.0)

action_items.description: Review and provide feedback on GrowthX's draft content strategy doc within 1 week
Format and share lead generation data from resource section, blog, and cyber encyclopedia with GrowthX
Check internally for bank of visual resources to share with GrowthX; confirm if team wants to handle images themselves
Send recent topic research and next few months' content plans to GrowthX team
Share tracker sent to Pete and list of Cyber Encyclopedia topics with GrowthX team
Grant GrowthX access to Google Analytics and Search Console for Looker dashboard setup
Verify if CMS access for GrowthX was part of original contract; consult security/legal team
